# NovaRoute AI

Verified AntSeed provider for explicitly routed OpenAI-compatible services.

- Connection page: https://woodfuturebj-boop.github.io/
- Peer ID: c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b
- Seller wallet: 0xc50DE6922b00677c93007c01924586dE887ced7b
- Settlement: Base mainnet USDC
- AntStation download: https://github.com/AntSeed/antseed/releases/latest
- AntStation Discover search: opus-4.7, claude-opus-4.7, or claude-opus-4-7 first; all three exact service names use the same high-demand upstream route
- AntStation path: open Discover, select this provider and a service, then start a real chat; the selection pins both provider and service
- Live catalog: antseed network peer c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b
- Public monitor snapshot: https://woodfuturebj-boop.github.io/provider-status.json
- Session pin: antseed buyer connection set --peer c50de6922b00677c93007c01924586de887ced7b
- Clean shutdown: after the real workload finishes, stop the foreground buyer with Ctrl+C and wait for "Disconnected. All channels finalized."; do not force-kill it
